mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY ( REPLY_NO, BOARD_NO, USER_NO, REPLY_CONTENT, REPLY_DATE, REPLY_DELETE ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPLY_NO.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{userNo}, #{replyContent}, SYSDATE, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND REPLY_DELETE = 'N'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT R.REPLY_NO, R.BOARD_NO, R.USER_NO, R.REPLY_CONTENT, R.REPLY_DATE, M.USER_NAME FROM REPLY R JOIN MEMBER M ON (R.USER_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE R.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND R.REPLY_DELETE = 'N' ORDER BY R.REPLY_NO DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
